name: Brilliant Earth Group, Inc.
business: Brilliant Earth is an innovative, digitally native omnichannel jewelry company, and a global leader in ethically sourced fine jewelry. It offers exclusive designs with superior craftsmanship and supply chain transparency, delivered to customers through a highly personalized omnichannel experience. The company sells diamond engagement and wedding rings, gemstone rings, and fine jewelry to consumers in over 50 countries.

exposures.sentence: Brilliant Earth is an innovative, digitally native omnichannel jewelry company, and a global leader in ethically sourced fine jewelry.
Through our intuitive digital commerce platform and personalized individual appointments in our showrooms, we cater to the shopping preferences of tech-savvy next-generation consumers.

tamClaims.claim: The global jewelry industry was estimated to be approximately $350 billion in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: The global jewelry industry was estimated to be approxima tely $350 billion in 2024, a ccording to Statista.

tamClaims.claim: Fine jewelry represented 65% of the global jewelry market in 2022.
tamClaims.sentence: Fine jewelry, which includes earrings, necklaces, bracelets, and rings (other than engagement or wedding), represented 65% of the global jewelry market in 2022, according to the Bain Report.
